name: Power Generation
description: Gas turbine spare parts and field support for baseload, peaking, and combined-cycle power plants running GE Frame and Siemens SGT units.

name: Oil & Gas
description: Turbine support for onshore and offshore operations, including LM2500 and LM6000 aeroderivative platforms used in compression and power applications.

name: Marine & Offshore
description: Parts and technical support for marine gas turbine installations, where downtime isn't an option.

name: Industrial Manufacturing
description: Industrial gas turbine services for facilities running captive power and cogeneration units.

name: Utilities & Cogeneration
description: Reliable sourcing for utility-scale operators managing large turbine fleets across multiple sites.

name: Government & Defense Power
description: NSN and CAGE-referenced turbine components for defense and government power installations, sourced with full documentation.
